CustomMetadata.label: SRA-003 - Sensitive object OWD set to Pu

values.value: Sensitive object OWD set to Public Read/Write
The org-wide default for Opportunity, Lead, or Case is set to Public Read/Write. Sales pipeline, lead data, and support cases are visible and editable by all users.
Sales pipeline and customer service data is fully public internally. Competitors, recently offboarded contractors, or compromised accounts have unrestricted access to all sensitive data.
Change OWD to Private for Opportunity, Lead, and Case in Setup > Sharing Settings. Add role-based or territory-based sharing rules to restore legitimate cross-team access.
